response.justification: Wei Chen is primarily a web and full-stack developer whose core expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not C++ or Rust. While there is some geospatial exposure through the GISCollective project and Green Map GIS work, these are built on web technologies rather than systems-level C++. The only commercial C++ experience appears to be a brief six-month role at National Instruments in 2014–2015, and C++ is conspicuously absent from the candidate's listed skills. The role demands deep, production-grade C++ (or Rust) systems programming for a routing data pipeline, which this resume does not demonstrate.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain exposure through GISCollective open-source platform and Green Map GIS application
High-performance distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency async I/O in DLang
Broad polyglot background and comfort operating across the full stack, including Linux environments
concerns: C++ is absent from the listed skills section; only minimal commercial C++ experience from a brief 2014–2015 role
No Rust experience mentioned anywhere in the resume
No demonstrated experience with routing pipelines, navigation tiling, geospatial data transformation at systems level, or traffic/map data integration
